Located in the Krishna district of Andhra Pradesh, Hamsaladeevi is a tiny village near Machilipatnam town. The village is situated at the confluence where River Krishna merges into the Bay of Bengal.
moreTextHidden: This point is known as Sagara Sangamam and is an important tourist attraction. Here the water can be seen in three different shades. Besides, the highlight of the village is the Hamsaladeevi beach where you can sit and relax and enjoy the gorgeous sunsets.
